channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Panicked Democrats scramble to offset back-to-back-to-back redistricting blows
item.description: Republican chances of keeping the House are surging, as panicked Democrats scramble to offset back-to-back-to-back redistricting blows. Why it matters...

item.title: Trump's ruthless midterm power play
item.description: President Trump is flexing his dominance over the Republican Party to stamp out primaries that would bleed party coffers and fracture the GOP ahead of...

item.title: "Momflation" is changing how we celebrate Mother's Day
item.description: Americans are still showing up for mom this Mother's Day — but with more budgeting, bargain hunting and strategic splurging as "momflation" pushes up ...

item.title: The Trump administration's claim of "zero" border crossings is falling apart
item.description: The Trump administration's flat-out claim that no one is illegally crossing the southern border is starting to fall apart. Why it matters: The rush of...
